## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/s3KxYceAWBpqum92aySqN4x4zZ5sjqUA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance improved: 116 more clicks (550 total), 5,000 more impressions week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/s3KxYceAWBpqum92aySqN4x4zZ5sjqUA?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Integration pages focus: 24 total in backend, 10 launched this week (including latest batch of 4)](https://fathom.video/share/s3KxYceAWBpqum92aySqN4x4zZ5sjqUA?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [SEO optimization: 10 high-impression, low-click pages identified for title/meta description updates](https://fathom.video/share/s3KxYceAWBpqum92aySqN4x4zZ5sjqUA?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
  - [Content production: 7 new drafts, 1 new e-commerce SEO article published](https://fathom.video/share/s3KxYceAWBpqum92aySqN4x4zZ5sjqUA?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)

## Topics

### Performance Metrics and Keyword Tracking

  - [Added best-ranking keyword and position for each published article in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/s3KxYceAWBpqum92aySqN4x4zZ5sjqUA?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Debate on keyword density importance: agreed to ensure keywords in H1s/H2s, but avoid over-optimization](https://fathom.video/share/s3KxYceAWBpqum92aySqN4x4zZ5sjqUA?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Kyle (new GrowthX member) advised against focusing too heavily on keyword density](https://fathom.video/share/s3KxYceAWBpqum92aySqN4x4zZ5sjqUA?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)

### Integration Pages Progress

  - [24 total integration pages in backend](https://fathom.video/share/s3KxYceAWBpqum92aySqN4x4zZ5sjqUA?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [New batch of 10 launched, including 4 most recent](https://fathom.video/share/s3KxYceAWBpqum92aySqN4x4zZ5sjqUA?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [Discussed image/thumbnail creation for integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/s3KxYceAWBpqum92aySqN4x4zZ5sjqUA?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
      - [Paul: Not a priority currently, existing system sufficient](https://fathom.video/share/s3KxYceAWBpqum92aySqN4x4zZ5sjqUA?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
      - [Will confirm with Victor upon return](https://fathom.video/share/s3KxYceAWBpqum92aySqN4x4zZ5sjqUA?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)

### Content Optimization Strategy

  - [Identified 10 pages with high impressions but low clicks](https://fathom.video/share/s3KxYceAWBpqum92aySqN4x4zZ5sjqUA?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
  - [Created new tab in Airtable with old/new SEO titles and meta descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/s3KxYceAWBpqum92aySqN4x4zZ5sjqUA?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Updates made on 2023-10-29, will measure CTR improvements](https://fathom.video/share/s3KxYceAWBpqum92aySqN4x4zZ5sjqUA?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)

### Content Production and Refreshes

  - [Andrej: All refreshed content available in Airtable, marked as "done" or "in progress"](https://fathom.video/share/s3KxYceAWBpqum92aySqN4x4zZ5sjqUA?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
